creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
I'm not sure what your issue is, but thousands of people build and start
this daily.  I'm sure its local setup.

If you are willing to take this discussion to apache@ list, I might be
able to help you there.

Also, your apache port version is out of date.

--
